summary: Tested new ProfilePage design with AnimatedBackground, GlowingAvatar, Badges, and StatCards. All 12 features verified working correctly. Login, profile navigation, edit mode, and logout all functional.

frontend_features: Login with naifliver@gmail.com / As11223344 works correctly
Profile page displays with new design
AnimatedBackground - Gradient background with 3 animated blur elements visible
GlowingAvatar - Avatar with glowing frame based on level (rose/pink glow for level 5)
Level Badge - Shows level 5 on avatar
User name (Liver_97) and username (@_97) display correctly
4 Stat Cards visible: متابع (0), عملة (1000), متابَع (0), غرفة (0)
Badges Section - 'الشارات والإنجازات' with 6 badge icons (متحدث, مالك غرفة, محبوب, نجم, موثق, أسطورة)
Edit button 'تعديل الملف الشخصي' works - opens edit form
Edit mode shows: name input, username input, bio textarea, album button, random avatar button, save/cancel buttons
Random avatar button generates new avatar correctly
Logout button 'تسجيل الخروج' works - redirects to landing page

feature_verified.feature: New ProfilePage Design with Framer Motion
feature_verified.description: ProfilePage redesigned with AnimatedBackground, GlowingAvatar, Badge, and StatCard components using framer-motion animations
components_verified: AnimatedBackground - Animated gradient with blur elements
GlowingAvatar - Glowing frame with level-based colors
StatCard - 4 stat cards (followers, following, coins, rooms)

critical_code_review_comments: AnimatedBackground uses framer-motion for smooth animations
GlowingAvatar has 5 different glow colors based on user level
Level is calculated from coins: Math.min(5, Math.floor((user?.coins || 0) / 100) + 1)
6 badges defined with earned conditions based on user data
Edit mode properly handles avatar upload and random generation
All components use proper RTL layout
context_for_next_testing_agent: New ProfilePage design tested: 1) AnimatedBackground with gradient and blur elements. 2) GlowingAvatar with level-based glow colors. 3) Level badge on avatar. 4) 4 StatCards (followers, following, coins, rooms). 5) 6 Badges section with earned/unearned states. 6) Edit mode with name, username, bio fields and avatar options. 7) Logout functionality. All features working correctly.
